name: Treason and Security Clearance
summary: Clearance-Grenzen steuern Wissen, Ausruestung und Konflikt-Eskalation.

mechanics.treason_points: Accumulate via violations; penalties escalate from reprimand to execution.
mechanics.core_loop: Accuse, defend, frame, and survive bureaucracy.
mechanics.gm_tool: Use contradictory orders to force loyalty tests.
